Notes: LCC from press kit. Prime mission 60 days.
Viking 1 launch: 20 Aug 1975. Viking 2 launch: 9 Sept 1975.
Operations includes orbiter and lander costs
Viking 2 lander end-of-mission: 11 Apr 1980. Viking 1 orbiter end-of-mission: 17 Aug 1980
Viking 1 lander placed in automatic data transmission mode in Jan 1981. Continued funding for data analysis but no longer separate funding for mission operations.
